title: Robert Kern
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Robert Kern''' is an author for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]. He penned supplements published by [[West End Games]] for its D6 system.

==Star Wars credits==
*''[[Game Chambers of Questal]]''
